nasb.text: I will make you an everlasting desolation and your cities will not be inhabited. Then you will know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: I will make you a perpetual desolation, and your cities shall not be inhabited. Then you will know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必使你永遠荒涼，你的城市必沒有人居住；你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要使你永远荒废，你的城邑杳无人迹，这样你就知道我是耶和华。
